textByHashes.2d2965545ebf1097a4c828ea4c5edde072610fae: Tread carefully in this hallowed place, traveller. The magicks of the Dark Altar are not to be treated lightly.
textByHashes.b8c085aaa556a82492276df5c3e3283536f63c0e: The Dark Altar is the treasure of Arceuus. Our forebears spent their lives - literally, in some cases - learning to unlock its secrets and wield its power.
textByHashes.ba6a7381c5ac83bf44b4d31400b917f27feb578d: The power of the Dark Altar, reflected in these great crystals, can twist dimensions, warp minds, and even bridge the gulf between life and death.
textByHashes.9dd44662ae83f69bc8410a08715e074ff535b170: Very well. If you find an ensouled cadaver in your travels, you may attempted to reanimate it with the magicks I have placed in your mind.
textByHashes.250d0680667bcf932c605683de28d78baf2cb063: Very well, the magicks of the Dark Altar have been lifted from your mind.
textByHashes.40d77626c0aeb8c2004cf1c999bfb37a425acfa4: I suppose you are a friend to us. Free up some space and I will give you something.
textByHashes.8b288297da1cda5d1b3ea56e45ad878260c3d6eb: I suppose you are a friend to us. Here, you may have this.
textByHashes.98712f0e4cb6ffbd5116de5c99918d79e8d669b1: No. You need to complete all of the hard tasks in your Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary.
textByHashes.05205cca5167e15ca07e9b552342e944825b3414: Not unless you make space to carry it, traveller.
textByHashes.89259c725c9c9edc8f8eb77d1060a6ca71d149f3: Thanks for your efforts throughout the tasks set. Here, you may have this.
textByHashes.12dcc1b521a7c54f2526b5236f3195b0a5933cb4: You already appear to own such a device, traveller.
textByHashes.be86b156c7aa78b80ad04e935f76e834754e6b1d: Yes, I believe the Dark Altar may even reward you for such a sacrifice.
